title: IIMB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Manager Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Management Bangalore (IIMB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Manager Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech in Computer Science Engineering can apply for the IIMB Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age...
